results.title: 8 Best Inbox Zero Alternatives in 2026: AI Email Tools
results.content:
Closest open-source alternative to Inbox Zero? Inbox Zero itself is open source — that’s part of why it’s interesting. There aren’t many other serious open-source AI email tools right now.

Inbox Zero alternative that takes action, not just sorts? Carly. Where Inbox Zero categorizes and drafts, Carly responds: schedules meetings, updates CRM, enriches leads, creates tasks across 200+ tools.

Best for Outlook users? Inbox Zero is Gmail-only. For Outlook, MailMaestro and Carly both support Outlook. SaneBox works with everything. See our best AI tools for Outlook users for more.

Best for teams? Carly for AI agents acting across business tools. Spark Mail for shared inboxes and collaboration. Notion Mail if you’re already in Notion. [...] Inbox Zero (the open-source AI email tool, not the productivity philosophy) is one of the more interesting recent entrants — open-source, self-hostable, AI-powered bulk unsubscribe, smart categorization, and AI-drafted replies for Gmail. The free open-source version is genuinely useful, and the hosted version is reasonably priced. But it’s still primarily an inbox-cleanup tool: it helps you process email faster, but doesn’t take action on what’s inside the messages. And it’s worth knowing that the deterministic, rule-based sorting that gets you to inbox zero — label this, archive that — doesn’t need AI at all, which is why on a tool like Carly that work runs free. Here are eight alternatives that cover different angles.

## 1. Carly [...] ## Inbox Zero Alternatives Compared

| Tool | Approach | Open Source | Takes Action Beyond Email | Starting Price |
 ---  --- 
| Carly | AI agents via email | No | Yes (200+ apps) | $35/mo |
| SaneBox | Server filtering | No | No | $7/mo |
| Superhuman | Fast email client | No | No | $30/mo |
| Shortwave | AI Gmail client | No | No | Free / $8/mo |
| Fyxer | AI inbox sorter | No | No | $30/mo |
| Notion Mail | Notion email client | No | Limited | Free / $10/mo |
| MailMaestro | AI drafting extension | No | No | Free / $19/mo |
| Spark Mail | Cross-platform client | No | No | Free / $8/mo |

## FAQ

Cheapest Inbox Zero alternative? Inbox Zero itself is free if you self-host. Spark Mail and Shortwave have free tiers. SaneBox is the cheapest paid alternative at $7/month.

results.title: Top Best AI Email Assistant Alternatives For Agencies
results.content:
If you’re a business owner, agency leader, or revenue operator who’s tired of being the glue between tools, the most valuable “best ai email assistant alternative” may not be another inbox plugin at all — but a transparent, reliable computer agent. That’s exactly the gap Simular Pro is built to fill. When you’re ready to see what it looks like to delegate entire workflows, not just emails, it’s time to try Simular.

## Stop doing repetitive tasks. Let Sai handle them for you.

Sai is your AI computer use agent — it operates your apps, automates your workflows, and gets work done while you focus on what matters.

 Try Sai

### FAQS

Using browser-only vs computer agents for email

Choosing autonomous vs non-autonomous assistants

Human-in-the-loop visibility vs black-box automation [...] ‍

### 5. Gmelius — Gmail Wrapper For Collaborative Workflows

Gmelius takes a different angle on the “best ai email assistant” problem. Rather than replacing your client, it wraps around Gmail (and Google Workspace) to add shared inboxes, Kanban-style boards, and automation for teams.

Its AI features focus on drafting, routing, and organizing — helping support teams, agencies, and internal ops keep on top of shared mailboxes without stepping on each other’s toes.

‍

Pros

 Tight Gmail integration; you keep your existing interface with extra power layered on.
 Great for teams managing group addresses like support@ or hello@.
 Mixes human collaboration (assigning, commenting) with rules and AI suggestions.

‍

Cons [...] ‍

### 3. Lindy — No-Code Outlook Workflow Automation

If your world revolves around Outlook and you’d rather design automations than maintain them in code, Lindy is a compelling alternative. It positions itself as a no-code AI automation platform that plugs into Outlook, your CRM, calendar, and dozens of other business tools.

Lindy can read email context, triage your inbox, send templated or AI‑generated replies, and then carry on doing the “afterwork”: logging interactions in the CRM, assigning tasks in project tools, or scheduling meetings.

‍

Pros

results.title: 8 Best AI Email Apps in 2026 | FiloMail
results.content:
### Biggest Weakness

The AI feels bolted on rather than integrated. Spark's core identity is collaboration, and the AI features (while functional) don't fundamentally change how you process email. No smart labeling, no automatic to-do extraction, no AI search.

### Best For

Small teams and startups that share customer-facing inboxes and need a free or low-cost solution. Individual users looking for deep AI features will find more substance elsewhere. If you're considering switching from Spark, see our upcoming Best Spark Mail Alternatives guide.

## 4. Shortwave: Best AI-Powered Search

Pricing: Business $24/month, Premier $36/month, Max $100/month (billed annually) Platforms: Web, iOS, Android, Mac Best for: Power users who want the most aggressive AI email automation [...] Absolutely. Most AI email apps on this list connect to Gmail via the Gmail API. Your emails stay in Gmail. You're just using a different window to view and interact with them. Switching back (or trying multiple apps) is painless because nothing moves.

## Further Reading

 Best Superhuman Alternatives in 2026 — Our in-depth comparison if you're specifically looking to switch from Superhuman
 Why FiloMail Isn't a 'Better Gmail' (And Why It Matters) (And Why It Matters) — The philosophy behind AI-native email

 Shortwave vs. Superhuman — Zapier's detailed comparison of two leading AI email clients

## More from Filo [...] ## 7. Missive: Best for Team Collaboration

Pricing: Starter $14/user/month, Productive $24/user/month, Business $36/user/month (billed annually) Platforms: Web, iOS, macOS Best for: Client-facing teams that need shared inboxes with workflow automation

Missive isn't trying to be an AI email client. It's a team communication platform that happens to include email. The AI features are powered by your own OpenAI account (bring-your-own-key), which is an unusual approach that gives you more control but requires more setup.
